name: QNI : Access to Improperly Secured Service - RDP Session Without Enhanced RDP Security
notes:
This rule triggers when any RDP encryption level is detected which can mean that enhanced RDP Security is not being utilized and the connection may be insecure. 
Enhanced RDP security results in other network protocols appearing on your network rather than RDP (e.g. TLS-encrypted RDP sessions will just appear as TLS).
conditions_text: when the flow matches "rdp encryption level" IS NOT NULL AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY QNI : Access to Improperly Secured Service - RDP Session Without Enhanced RDP Security on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow matches "rdp encryption level" IS NOT NULL AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: QNI : Access to Improperly Secured Service - RDP Session Without Enhanced RDP Security
Event description: Detects when any RDP encryption level is observed.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
